Package org.key_project.util.collection

Interface Graph<V,E>

Type Parameters:
V - the graph vertex type
E - the graph edge type
All Known Implementing Classes:
DirectedGraph, EquivalenceDirectedGraph
public interface Graph<V,E>
A graph object G(V,E) contains a set V of vertices and a set E of edges. Each edge e=(v1,v2) in E connects source vertex v1 to target vertex v2. For more information about graphs and their related definitions see Wolfram MathWorld.

  • Method Details

    • addVertex

      boolean addVertex(V v)
      Adds the specified vertex to this graph if not already present.
      Parameters:
      v - vertex to be added to this graph.
      Returns:
      true if this graph did not already contain the specified vertex.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if the specified vertex is null.

    • addEdge

      void addEdge(V source, V target, E edge)
      Add an edge to this graph.
      Parameters:
      source - source vertex
      target - target vertex
      edge - edge

    • containsVertex

      boolean containsVertex(V v)
      Parameters:
      v - vertex to search for
      Returns:
      whether that vertex is in the graph

    • incomingEdgesOf

      Collection<E> incomingEdgesOf(V v)
      Parameters:
      v - vertex
      Returns:
      incoming edges of v (edges that have v as target)

    • outgoingEdgesOf

      Collection<E> outgoingEdgesOf(V v)
      Parameters:
      v - vertex
      Returns:
      outgoing edges of v (edges that have v as source)

    • getEdgeSource

      V getEdgeSource(E edge)
      Parameters:
      edge - edge
      Returns:
      source vertex of this edge

    • getEdgeTarget

      V getEdgeTarget(E edge)
      Parameters:
      edge - edge
      Returns:
      target vertex of this edge

    • vertexSet

      Set<V> vertexSet()
      Returns:
      collection of vertices in this graph (updated as the graph changes)

    • edgeSet

      Set<E> edgeSet()
      Returns:
      collection of edges in this graph

    • removeAllVertices

      void removeAllVertices(Collection<V> vertices)
      Removes all specified vertices from this graph. Attached edges are also removed.
      Parameters:
      vertices - vertices to remove

    • removeVertex

      void removeVertex(V v)
      Remove a vertex and all associated edges.
      Parameters:
      v - vertex to remove

    • removeEdge

      void removeEdge(E e)
      Remove an edge.
      Parameters:
      e - edge to remove
